step_rationale: Sulfotransferase regulating estrogen metabolism and atherosclerosis progression via hormone-dependent mechanisms.
mechanism: Sulfotransferase SULT1E1 regulates estrogen-dependent vascular inflammation and atherosclerotic plaque development.

references.title: Interaction of Native- and Oxidized-Low-Density Lipoprotein with Human Estrogen Sulfotransferase.
